title: 在团队频道里直接 @ Claude：Claude Tag 如何协作处理 PR、文档与权限边界
author: Claude
content:
Tag Claude in, right where you already work

Anthropic has officially launched Claude Tag, an integration that allows the Claude AI assistant to seamlessly collaborate alongside product, engineering, and legal teams within their existing communication channels.

Driving Development at Anthropic

Claude Tag has fundamentally reshaped day-to-day operations at Anthropic, where it has been utilized internally throughout the year. The tool currently accounts for 65% of Anthropic's product pull requests, acting as an automated collaborator that streamlines code contributions directly within team interactions.

Real-Time Collaboration and Contextual Awareness

During live team workflows, Claude operates in a multiplayer fashion. It monitors group threads, tracks development choices in real time, locates relevant spots in a codebase, and executes required changes independently.

Beyond just committing code, Claude adapts to various functional needs across a business. For example, when code modifications occur, it recognizes the implications for auxiliary teams—such as launch marketing—and updates relevant tracking documentation itself to eliminate cross-team communication delays.

A Strict Security and Permissions Architecture

Security is built directly into how Claude interacts with human teams:

  • Isolated Permissions: Claude uses dedicated accounts equipped with independent credentials, meaning all system access is explicitly logged.
  • Channel Constraints: Access rights are strictly bound to individual communication spaces. A Claude instance tagged inside a legal channel can analyze contract information, but it is completely blind to engineering repositories.
  • Strict Boundaries: Memory respects structural walls. Information discussed or gathered inside a private channel or a direct message (DM) stays contained within that precise context.
aiSummary: Anthropic 将 Claude Tag 定位为融入团队频道的 AI 协作者，可以跟进讨论、创建代码 PR、更新发布文档，并按频道执行安全边界。
oneSentenceSummary: Anthropic 将 Claude Tag 定位为融入团队频道的 AI 协作者，可以跟进讨论、创建代码 PR、更新发布文档，并按频道执行安全边界。
summary: 这支 Anthropic 第一方发布短片介绍了 Claude Tag：团队可以在现有协作频道里直接 @ Claude，让它参与产品、工程、法务和发布沟通。Lydia 提到，Anthropic 今年内部已经大量采用这种模式，Claude Tag 负责创建了 65% 的产品 PR。演示把 Claude 呈现为多人协作中的队友：它能跟进群组线程，响应实时产品决策，定位相关代码区域，创建 PR，并同步更新发布营销材料，减少跨团队交接等待。最有价值的部分是安全模型：Claude 使用独立账号，权限按团队和频道划定，记忆隔离，凭据使用有日志记录。整体内容简洁、实用，能帮助读者理解产品方向，但更接近精炼的发布演示，而不是深入的技术拆解。

mainPoints.point: Claude Tag 将 Claude 直接嵌入团队频道
mainPoints.explanation: 核心思路是让产品、工程、法务和发布讨论发生在哪里，团队就能在哪里 @ Claude，把它变成频道原生的协作者，而不是另一个需要切换的独立工具。

mainPoints.point: Anthropic 声称内部已有大量 PR 自动化
mainPoints.explanation: 视频称 Claude Tag 创建了 Anthropic 产品 PR 的 65%，这个发布主张因此有了具体的运营数据支撑，尽管视频没有解释统计口径和方法。

mainPoints.point: Claude 能跟进实时团队决策并执行代码变更
mainPoints.explanation: 在工程示例里，Claude 跟上群组线程，理解功能请求，找到代码库中的修改位置，创建 PR，并完成对应改动。

mainPoints.point: 跨职能协作也是产品承诺的一部分
mainPoints.explanation: 演示不只停留在写代码，还展示 Claude 识别到工程变更会影响发布营销，并更新相关文档，从而降低沟通延迟。

mainPoints.point: 安全设计围绕范围化账号和隔离记忆展开
mainPoints.explanation: Claude 拥有自己的账号和凭据，访问权限按团队与频道限定，记忆遵守私有边界，凭据使用也会被记录，便于追责。

keyQuotes: 今天我们发布 Claude Tag，让 Claude 可以直接在团队身边协作
在 Anthropic 内部，Claude Tag 创建了我们 65% 的产品 PR
Nadia 给 Claude 发消息后，Claude 会跟上群组线程，并响应实时做出的产品决策
很酷的一点是，Claude 知道这个功能是什么，也知道该去代码库的哪里改
记忆遵守同样的边界，所以它在私有频道或 DM 中学到的内容会留在那里
